rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement could marginally ease oil/gas prices relevant to Polish energy costs, but no confirmed structural change; war in Ukraine continues without new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: Stock markets surge on news; potential oil supply relief could modestly ease EU energy prices affecting Polish households.

top_events.title: Israel strikes in southern Lebanon / overnight Gaza strikes
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East escalation keeps energy market uncertainty elevated, indirect effect on EU energy prices.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active
top_events.summary: Climate disruption could affect agricultural commodity prices, with minor indirect impact on Polish food inflation.
